_meta.methodology: BUILD_PROCESS.md (brain -> skills -> 14-param -> modules/canonical -> principles -> unit+browser tests -> verify)
_meta.scope: exercise the write-panel generalization on a second module (finance adjustments)

title: Write panels — second module: finance invoice -> Adjustments (add-only), via the generalized mechanism
business_reason: Prove FR-0004's write-panel mechanism generalizes by opting a structurally harder child (finance_adjustments) in via config only — it needs a server-generated code, a parent-inherited school_id, and a NOT-NULL updated_at. Approval intentionally stays in the finance dual-approval workflow, so this panel is add-only (request an adjustment).
brain_skills: Brain: complete = request a financial adjustment in context; approval stays in the controlled workflow. Skills: 05 API Contract, 08 Security (mass-assignment + inherit), 09 Audit, 02 Data Model (real CHECK enums).

param_14.question: Opt finance adjustments into write panels add-only, deriving code + school_id server-side.
param_14.answer: Extend addChildRecord with reusable opts: codeColumn/codePrefix (server PREFIX-XXXXXXXX), parentTable+inherit (copy school_id from the invoice), nowColumns (stamp updated_at). _detail_panels WRITE_PANELS['finance_adjustments'] = add-only (no review) with adjustment_type/amount/reason, actorColumn requested_by, defaults {adjustment_status: draft}. gen_modules emits POST (no [cid] PATCH, since no review). Enum values from the migration CHECK (discount/waiver/credit_note/refund/reversal/tax_adjustment/commission_adjustment).
param_14.answer_source: migration 0001 finance_adjustments/finance_invoices DDL (CHECK + NOT NULL + FK) + 0018 (requested_by nullable)
param_14.data_entities: finance_adjustments insert (code + inherited school_id + actor + defaults); audit_events
param_14.workflow_entities: adjustment created as draft; approval via finance workflow (not this panel)
param_14.security_implications: POST staff-write guarded; only adjustment_type/amount/reason accepted; school_id is inherited from the parent invoice (client value ignored); adjustment_code server-generated; adjustment_status forced to the draft default (client cannot set approved); audited.
param_14.approval_implications: approval deferred to finance dual-approval workflow (P3.4) — deliberately not in the panel
param_14.downstream_dependencies: the new addChildRecord opts (code/inherit/now) are reusable by any future write panel needing them.
param_14.assumptions: add-only is correct for financial records; file/PDF handling not in scope.

principles_pass.P0.6: addChildRecord opts (code/inherit/nowColumns) are generic; finance opted in by config only
principles_pass.P3.9: mass-assignment-safe — school_id inherited, code generated, status forced to default (client cannot forge any)
principles_pass.P3.4: high-value approval kept in the dual-approval workflow, not a simple panel
principles_pass.P2.2: enum values from the real CHECK constraints

functional: addChildRecord generates code, inherits school_id from parent, stamps updated_at, keeps default status (unit)
browser: request a discount adjustment on E2E-INV-CH4 -> ADJ- code + inherited school_id + draft; Adjustments panel renders add form
security_owasp: A08: client adjustment_status/school_id ignored (forced default / inherited)
followup: opt-in more children (roster corrections, support attachments)
adjustment approval already covered by finance workflow

verification: tsc clean; unit child_write 5/5 incl. the finance generalized-opts test (152 total); browser 07_finance_adjustment (server code+inherit+draft + panel UI) green; drift OK. e2e requires the finance invoice fixture (seed_chain3.sql), same as chain4.
